headline: Tapestry CEO: Coach Brand Balances Magic and Logic to Drive Growth
summary: There’s a phrase that Joanne Crevoiserat, CEO of Tapestry (NYSE:TPR), keeps coming back to. Standing inside Coach’s flagship store on Fifth Avenue during a recent Mad Money segment with Jim Cramer, she put it plainly: “Coach has always been a brand that has balanced magic and logic. It takes both to really bring a great ... Tapestry CEO: Coach Brand Balances Magic and Logic to Drive Growth
